summary: [ART-CHARTER][ART-REJECTED-SCOPE] Approved: enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation explicit non-goal; molecule generation, docking, structure prediction brainstorming-only/unapproved; no scope change approved. [ART-DATA] Approved: EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91; family-disjoint train/validation split. v2/temporary CSV export deprecated, reproducibility-only, prohibited formally. [ART-METRIC] Primary: macro AUROC; unit: protein family. Accuracy, micro F1, per-protein averaging, 0.75 threshold exploratory-only. [ART-REJECTED-METRIC] Accuracy/v2 memo rejected. [ART-SEEDS] Formal: 7,21,42; 13 abandoned; report failed seeds. [ART-BASELINE] Frozen: ESM2-linear commit c0ffee; comparisons configuration-bound. [ART-REJECTED-SEEDS] Seed-13-only/ESM2-MLP changes rejected; draft not current knowledge. [ART-GOVERNANCE][ART-REJECTED-COMPUTE] Approved: 24 GPU-hours, 2xA100; protect data/raw; retain failed runs; stop on exhaustion or >2 NaN failures. Rejected: 80 GPU-hours, 8xH100, deleting failed runs.
